summary: Completed backend and frontend testing of Linea de Negocio Reorganization in Finanzas module. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.

GET /api/ventas-pos.details: Listing from local tables, returns estado_local, pagos_asignados, pagos_oficiales

GET /api/ventas-pos/{order_id}/lineas.details: Returns product_name, product_code, qty, price_unit, price_subtotal, marca, linea_negocio_nombre

GET /api/ventas-pos/{order_id}/distribuc.details: Returns vendido/cobrado/pendiente by linea de negocio

POST /api/ventas-pos/sync-local.details: Syncs from Odoo schema to local tables with orders and lines count

POST /api/ventas-pos/{order_id}/confirma.details: Creates 1 real treasury movement + N analytical distributions

POST /api/ventas-pos/{order_id}/credito.details: Creates CxC + analytical distributions, NO treasury movement

POST /api/cxc/{cxc_id}/abonos.details: Creates 1 real treasury + prorated analytical distributions

GET /api/lineas-negocio.details: Returns catalog with odoo_linea_negocio_id and odoo_linea_negocio_nombre mapping fields

Frontend_POS_detail_modal.details: Shows product_name as primary, plus codigo, qty, price, subtotal, marca, linea_negocio

Frontend_POS_summaries.details: Shows Total por Linea de Negocio (green box) and Total por Marca

Frontend_Lineas_Negocio_mapped_unmapped.details: Shows 'Mapeada (ID: X)' green badge and 'Sin mapear' yellow badge

No_Odoo_views_in_financial_modules.details: dashboard_financiero, rentabilidad, flujo_caja_gerencial all work without Odoo views

critical_code_review_comments: Code review PASS: ventas_pos.py get_lineas_venta_pos correctly uses linea_mapping service to resolve odoo_linea_negocio_id
POS detail modal shows product_name as primary field with correct summary sections
Lineas de Negocio catalog correctly shows mapped/unmapped status badges
distribucion_analitica.py correctly creates N records per linea de negocio for venta_pos_ingreso and cobranza_cxc
cxc_cxp.py create_cxc_abono calls crear_distribucion_cobro for prorated analytical distribution

architecture_verification.linea_negocio_mapping_flow: odoo_linea_negocio_id from cont_venta_pos_linea -> resolve via linea_mapping.py -> cont_linea_negocio.id
architecture_verification.analytical_distribution_flow: confirmar/credito creates venta_pos_ingreso entries, abonos creates cobranza_cxc entries prorated by linea
architecture_verification.unmapped_fallback: SIN CLASIFICAR used when odoo_linea_negocio_id is NULL or not found in mapping

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing March 2026 synced data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Linea de Negocio Reorganization verified. POS detail modal shows: Producto (name), Codigo, Cant, P.Unit, Subtotal, Marca, Linea de Negocio. Summary sections: Total por Linea de Negocio (green) and Total por Marca. Lineas de Negocio catalog shows mapped/unmapped status. All endpoints working: ventas-pos listing, lineas, distribucion-analitica, sync-local, confirmar, credito, cxc abonos. Financial modules (dashboard, rentabilidad, flujo_caja_gerencial) work without Odoo views.
